title: Union Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Union Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
